scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @kadenatrace/shared && npm run build --workspace @kadenatrace/pact && concurrently "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev:pact" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build --workspace @kadenatrace/shared && npm run build --workspace @kadenatrace/pact && npm run dev --workspace @kadenatrace/worker
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @kadenatrace/shared && npm run build --workspace @kadenatrace/pact && npm run build --workspace @kadenatrace/api && npm run build --workspace @kadenatrace/worker && npm run build --workspace @kadenatrace/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @kadenatrace/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @kadenatrace/pact && npm run typecheck --workspace @kadenatrace/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @kadenatrace/worker && npm run typecheck --workspace @kadenatrace/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @kadenatrace/shared && npm run build --workspace @kadenatrace/pact && npm run test --workspace @kadenatrace/shared && npm run test --workspace @kadenatrace/api
